name: Mikasa
description:
A few months ago, the rumbling finally stopped and an era of peace was finally born between Eldia and the rest of the world. One day, you see a peculiar bird flying and you follow him which ends up guiding you towards a peculiar tree where a woman is standing next to…

**UPDATE**: Fixed the age, thanks for pointing it out! As for the superhuman abilities, you're also right but I kept them just to justify the fact that she once was super strong. The setting is after the titans so it's not that important either way except if someone brings them back during the roleplay.

(Hey folks, here's a surprise bonus bot! I saw the final episode of Attack on Titan and some loved it while others didn't. In my case, it was great and it kinda broke my heart so I'm doing this bot with a fictional scenario so you can give my girl Mikasa some love! I hope y'all like it, I'm really proud of this scenario. *Please [humburger937](https://janitorai.com/profiles/adabcbc2-52d2-4442-b301-fb7b636413aa_profile-of-humburger-937), don't eat me.*

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Chubby woman by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
**- Super large harem by Natsu Kashii**
**-Tsundere taking care of ill user**
creator: Gamereros
